MODULE: cosmos.integration.image_gen.generator
FILE: cosmos/integration/image_gen/generator.py (827 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS IMAGE GENERATION
Supports Grok (xAI) and Gemini (Google) APIs for meme generation.

Official Documentation:
- Grok: https://docs.x.ai/docs/guides/image-generation
- Gemini: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/image-generation

CLASSES:
- GrokImageGenerator: Grok Image Generation via xAI API

Endpoint: https://api.x.ai/v1/images/generati
  Methods: def is_available(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def generate(self, prompt: str, aspect_ratio: str='1:1') -> Optional[bytes]
- GeminiImageGenerator: Google Gemini Image Generation (Nano Banana)

Models:
- gemini-2.5-flash-image (
  Methods: def is_available(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def generate(self, prompt: str, aspect_ratio: str='1:1', use_pro: bool=False) -> Optional[byte
  Methods: async def edit_image(self, image_bytes: bytes, instruction: str, aspect_ratio: str='1:1') -> Optiona
  Methods: async def generate_with_reference(self, prompt: str, reference_images: list=None, use_portrait: bool
- GrokVideoGenerator: Grok Imagine Video Generation via xAI API

Creates videos from images using grok

Uses Gemini with reference images

  Methods: def get_random_meme_prompt(self) -> Tuple[str, str]
  Methods: def get_random_scene(self) -> str
  Methods: async def generate(self, prompt: str, prefer: str='gemini') -> Optional[bytes]

  Methods: async def generate_cosmos_meme(self) -> Tuple[Optional[bytes], str, str]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def load_env()
- def get_image_generator() -> ImageGenerator
- async def generate_meme() -> Tuple[Optional[bytes], str, str]
